notes.discovery-design-handoff: This looks ready for the Design phase. You can start a Design session to research the codebase and develop the approach.
notes.design-execute-standard: The approach is ready. You can now start the Execution phase. Switch to: `/preset execute` and then say 'Execute the plan at [path]. Auto-continue.'
notes.design-execute-epic: The epic approach and decomposition are ready. You can now start Execution at the child-plan level. Switch to: `/preset execute` and then say 'Execute the epic at [path].'
